description: Legal fragment in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (fl. 1100–1138 CE). Involving a certain [...] b. Ṭībān and Abū Mūsā and details concerning how an agent (wakīl) is to conduct affairs. The name Abū Naṣr Ghazāl(?) al-Kohen may appear toward the bottom. Much of the text remains, but the content is opaque. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
